ns0:entry.ns0:title: DefectDojo/django-DefectDojo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DefectDojo/django-DefectDojo
Language: html
Open-Source Unified Vulnerability Management, DevSecOps & ASPM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Unstructured-IO/unstructured
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Unstructured-IO/unstructured
Language: html
Convert documents to structured data effortlessly. Unstructured is open-source ETL solution for transforming complex documents into clean, structured formats for language models. Visit our website to learn more about our enterprise grade Platform product for production grade workflows, partitioning, enrichments, chunking and embedding.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: averygan/reclip
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/averygan/reclip
Language: html
Download videos from almost any website. Lightweight, self-hosted media downloader with a clean web UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cclank/cell-architecture-studio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cclank/cell-architecture-studio

ns0:entry.ns0:title: f/prompts.chat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/f/prompts.chat
Language: html
f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/fonts
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/fonts
Language: html
Font files available from Google Fonts, and a public issue tracker for all things Google Fonts

ns0:entry.ns0:title: matlab/simulink-agentic-toolkit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matlab/simulink-agentic-toolkit
Language: html
The Simulink Agentic Toolkit gives your AI agent both the tools and the expertise to work effectively with Simulink and Model-Based Design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sohutv/cachecloud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sohutv/cachecloud
Language: html
搜狐视频(sohu tv)Redis私有云平台 ：支持Redis多种架构(Standalone、Sentinel、Cluster)高效管理、有效降低大规模redis运维成本，提升资源管控能力和利用率。平台提供快速搭建/迁移，运维管理，弹性伸缩，统计监控，客户端整合接入等功能。(CacheCloud is a Redis cloud management platform. It supports Standalone, Sentinel, and Cluster architectures for Redis, effectively reducing large-scale Redis operation and maintenance costs, and improving re…

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trycua/cua
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trycua/cua
Language: html
Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).
